title: jujutsu fate
description: A fun JJK server for those who want to play Minecraft with jujutsu Kaisen mods
body: This jujutsu Kaisen server is for those people who want to play as some of there favorite characters in this server we 15 plus techniques that you switch between in the mid game progression i hope you enjoy our server.(We have switched over to Curseforge modpack code is:________)
